messages.content:
A software team is setting an automation strategy and begins by identifying business processes that could benefit from automation.

What should be the team’s next step after this?


defining the processes in clear and unambiguous language


planning the rollout of the automated solutions


creating a Center of Excellence for automation


building and testing the automated solutions
evaluating the feasibility and benefits of automating each process, prioritizing them, and identifying the appropriate automation tools or technologies to use.

nalysts at a security firm were tasked with monitoring a series of live cameras to detect possible threats, but this led to user error and missing potential red flags. The firm builds a system that analyzes data from the cameras to identify possible threats and flag them for human attention.

Which type of automation does this example describe?


Robotic Process Automation


Mechanization


Personal Automation


Intelligent Automation
Intelligent Automation.

A regional bank implemented an automated solution to streamline their operations for receiving and processing checks. They would like to further enhance the solution to recognize signs of potential fraud and alert their security teams accordingly.

Which technology could be combined with the current solution to do this?


Machine Learning


Robotic Process Automation


Mechanization


Sentiment Analysis
Machine Learning.

What is a benefit of developing an automation strategy?


It reduces the importance of human involvement in automation.


It provides a solution to an organization’s competitive gaps.


It requires no training or reskilling to implement across the organization.


It helps an organization decide which processes to automate.
It helps an organization decide which processes to automate.

What describes Accenture's approach to automation?


cloud-centered


human-centered


machine-centered


intelligence-centered
Human-centered.

A Project Manager sets up a recurring invite for meetings using a web-based calendar app on a mobile device.

What type of automation does this exemplify?


Intelligent Automation


Cognitive Automation


Hyperautomation


Personal Automation
Personal Automation.

What is a best practice when approaching an automation effort?


improving the current process before automating it


prioritizing cost reduction above all other goals


eliminating the need for a technical support team


acquiring new resources before starting automation work
Improving the current process before automating it.

What is the main difference between an automated Digital Worker and a traditional automated Bot?


A Bot requires Artificial Intelligence capabilities to function.


A Digital Worker focuses on a single specific task.


A Digital Worker can manage multi-faceted situations.


A Bot is a more advanced version of a Digital Worker.
A Digital Worker can manage multi-faceted situations, while a traditional automated Bot focuses on a single specific task.

An e-commerce platform is looking for a more efficient way to categorize survey results and social media interactions to learn what makes their customers happy or frustrated.

Which technique will be helpful for them in this case?


Predictive Analysis


Sentiment Analysis


Intrusive Automation


Personal Automation
Sentiment Analysis.

How do Design Tools build robots for a Robotic Process Automation (RPA) application?


through instructions written in plain text that are parsed into jobs by the design tool


through scripts written in a low-level programming language such as Assembly or C


through scripts written in a high-level programming language such as Java or Python


through workflows designed using drag-and-drop interfaces and minimal code instructions
Through workflows designed using drag-and-drop interfaces and minimal code instructions.

What key value does Accenture’s myConcerto bring to clients looking for automated solutions?


myConcerto functions an out-of-the-box platform solution that Accenture can hand off to clients.


myConcerto lets clients work side-by-side with Accenture to tailor and visualize their solutions.


myConcerto provides clients with a suite of ready-to-use productivity dashboards.


myConcerto uses slide presentations to demonstrate the capabilities of Accenture’s automated solutions.
myConcerto lets clients work side-by-side with Accenture to tailor and visualize their solutions.

What is the simplest form of automation?


Intelligent Automation


Mechanization


Robotic Process Automation


Robotics
Mechanization.

What is an example of an Intelligent Automation solution that makes use of Artificial Intelligence?


signing-in to various desktop applications


recognizing and interpreting natural language


copying text from a web browser


filling out forms with basic contact information
Recognizing and interpreting natural language.

What is the first step to approaching automation?


installing applications used to develop automation


aligning automation with business strategy


speeding up current operating procedures


implementing new business processes
Aligning automation with business strategy.

In the context of automation strategy, what is a Center of Excellence?


a team composed of the organization’s most senior Artificial Intelligence programmers


a central server where all of an organization’s automation software is hosted


a community that includes all those within an organization who have created automation programs


a team that establishes best practices for automation efforts within an organization
A team that establishes best practices for automation efforts within an organization.
